goal: Derive the per-key INDEX byte so a NEW KeyID can be added to the RFHUB table offline (FreshAuto-style).
unknown: index byte (1 byte per key) - not derivable from KeyID or master via simple ops

chip_profile.source: Autel programmer read of working fob (starts the car) = key #1 in dump
chip_profile.note: SK is the universal FCA/Mikron default - identical on the non-working blank chip too. SK is NOT the differentiator. Pages 1-3 and config appear FCA-standard.

hypotheses: index = truncated keyed MAC of KeyID under master secret (needs algorithm)
index = assigned by RFHUB during RoutineControl 0x0401 key-learn (not offline-derivable)
index = any non-empty value works; real auth is challenge-response w/ universal MIKRON SK (UNVERIFIED - bench test)
